---
name: Suggestion or correction
about: Suggest an addition, correction, or refinement to the map
title: '[Suggestion] '
labels: suggestion
assignees: ''
---

## Type of suggestion

<!-- Tick one or more -->

- [ ] Error correction (existing entity has wrong fact)
- [ ] Context or coverage refinement (existing entity needs more detail)
- [ ] New addition (mechanism not yet on the map)
- [ ] Layer reclassification (entity is in the wrong layer)
- [ ] Other

## Entity affected

<!-- If correcting or refining an existing entity, name it (e.g., "EU AI Act", "Anthropic RSP", "UK Ofcom"). For brand-new additions, leave blank. -->

## For new additions: which layer?

<!-- Tick one -->

- [ ] Layer 1 — International (multilateral norms and summits)
- [ ] Layer 2 — National regulation (statutes, executive orders, agencies)
- [ ] Layer 3 — Sub-national (US states acting where federal regulation is absent)
- [ ] Layer 4 — Industry voluntary (cross-firm commitments and codes)
- [ ] Layer 5 — Corporate self-governance (frontier safety frameworks at each lab)
- [ ] Layer 6 — Infrastructure (regulators, AISIs, evaluators, compute controls)

## What should change

<!-- Be specific. For corrections: what does the map currently say, and what should it say? For additions: what is the mechanism and what does it do? -->

## Primary source

<!-- URL to the official source (statute, regulation, framework PDF, lab page, government announcement). News articles are OK but primary sources are preferred — and please cite one even for things you "obviously know," since this map is verifiable end-to-end. -->

## Date of the change or fact

<!-- When did the regulation pass, the framework update, or the announcement happen? Helps me decide whether to update the snapshot date. -->

## Anything else worth knowing

<!-- Optional: why this matters, which other entities it connects to, scope or jurisdictional notes, etc. -->

---

*Thanks for helping keep the map accurate. The repo lives at https://github.com/buildwithwhy/ai-governance-map and the live site is https://ai-governance-map.buildwithwhy.com.*
